evals.prompt: We have integrations with 80 tools. Should we build integration landing pages for each one?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend building integration pages. Should provide the URL pattern, template structure, and data requirements. Should warn about quality standards — each page needs genuine content about the integration's use cases. Should recommend prioritizing integrations with the highest search volume first. Should reference site-architecture and seo-audit skills for technical setup.
